name: Chaitén
eruptionHistory: Erupted unexpectedly in 2008 after being dormant for over 9,000 years. The eruption forced complete evacuation of the nearby town of Chaitén.
description: Chaitén's 2008 eruption was remarkable for occurring with almost no warning after millennia of dormancy. It produced a massive rhyolite lava dome and destroyed the nearby town.
